changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.comment: Avoid import-worker lock contention on the shared data_freshness rows. gps_track is inserted near the start of a GPX import to obtain the ID; the old immediate trigger updated data_freshness('tracks') at that point and held the row lock until the whole import transaction committed. Deferring the trigger preserves rollback semantics while moving the freshness-row update to transaction commit.
changeSet.sql: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS gps_track_data_freshness ON gps_track

CREATE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER gps_track_data_freshness AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON gps_track DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness_imported_gps_track_trigger()
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS gps_track_data_data_freshness ON gps_track_data

CREATE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER gps_track_data_data_freshness AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON gps_track_data DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness_imported_gps_track_data_trigger()
